sentences.text: Hello. You've reached Lisa Meyer with apartment management consultants. Please leave me a message, and I will call you back as soon as possible. Have a wonderful day. You may start your message now.

Hey john calling from rentable. Hope you're well Happy New Year, apologize, I missed you here um on monday the 10th, it's about one o'clock. Um uh But Lisa um I wanted to reach out, I think um you had spoke with a couple of my colleagues previously about rentable um Patrick and Brendan. Um uh but we've had some internal shifts here in coverage here to start of the year and and I now cover the area and I I wanted to reach out in the hopes of um maybe connected with you at some point we'd love to hear how things are going. Um and also I did want to update you on a few things rentable but um one in particular being um I was told by my director that um one of the hurdles uh that's kind of partnering together previously had been the lack of an integration with um your property management software, uh which I think is rented G or or name um I've been told that we do now integrate um with that, so um great news there. Um and again would love to uh just connect with you and catch up at some point if you'd be open to it, um try sending you an email um as well,

but I think it looks like it's getting blocked or maybe is being filtered to your spam folder so um if you could give me a call back or shoot me an email when you have some time, I'd really appreciate it again john from rentable three thousand one hundred and seventy-four oh seven hundred thirty-five million ninety-three thousand one hundred and seventy-four oh seventy-three thousand five hundred and nine And my email is john at rentable dot C. O. Look forward to hearing from you. Talk to you soon.

conversation.title: Call: John Loughery and Shalysa Meier @ AMC LLC
